action.reasoning: Observation: Best score is 22.22% with linear_probe.pt. Only ~13 minutes left. The linear probe with simple TTA (no ensemble) gave the best result. Recent attempts to ensemble or change TTA weights have hurt. Decision: Submit eval with the best checkpoint (linear_probe.pt) using a simple, clean predict.py that just does standard + grayscale TTA with equal weights. This is what worked best.
